notes: Evals for the aggregate recipe of the axon4to5-migrate Skill, invoked in single mode. Each eval renders a `framework=<axon|axoniq> configuration=<native|spring> mode=single source=<abs path> skip-openrewrite=true` argument string and dispatches a subagent to execute the recipe sub-flow against the staged fixture. The grader checks (1) the in-place migrated source under `<workspace>/outputs/<file>` (grep_require / grep_forbid) and (2) the orchestrator's Result block at `<workspace>/outputs/result.md` (result_block_contains*). Fixtures live in `evals/axon4to5-migrate/fixtures/` (heroes + gamerental extracted from `.knowledge/repositories/axon-examples`, plus synthetic edge cases for shapes the bundled examples do not cover: deadline handler B4, map-typed @AggregateMember B2, multi-entity Step M, polymorphic Step P, state-stored aggregate, saga, test fixture, partial post-OpenRewrite state).

evals.name: spring-axoniq-calendar-straight
evals.prompt: You are inside an interactive Claude Code session. The axon4to5-migrate Skill lives at $SKILL_DIR. Open SKILL.md there, then invoke the orchestrator with arguments exactly `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. The orchestrator must: run its OpenRewrite pre-step, match the aggregate recipe (Calendar is annotated @Aggregate + @EventSourcingHandler), execute the recipe sub-flow, and rewrite $SOURCE IN PLACE to AF5 shape. After it finishes, copy the orchestrator's emitted Result block VERBATIM to $WORKSPACE/result.md (the block starts with `**Result:**` and ends after the last bullet). Do not invent content for result.md — it must be the literal block. No blocker is expected. No pinned decisions are needed.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.
expectations: Path A annotation @EventSourced applied with explicit tagKey="Calendar"
AF5 Path A import — note the .extension.spring. infix
AF4 AggregateLifecycle references removed (static import + call site)
AF4 @CreationPolicy annotation removed (replaced by @EntityCreator + instance handler)
Result block names the aggregate recipe

assertions.text: Path A annotation @EventSourced applied with explicit tagKey="Calendar"
AF5 Path A import — note the .extension.spring. infix
AF4 AggregateLifecycle references removed (static import + call site)
AF4 @CreationPolicy annotation removed (replaced by @EntityCreator + instance handler)
Result block names the aggregate recipe

evals.name: spring-axoniq-game-constructor-handler
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. Game has a CONSTRUCTOR-STYLE @CommandHandler (`public Game(RegisterGameCommand)`), a @Profile("command") Spring annotation that must be preserved, and an @ExceptionHandler (which is an Axon, not Spring, interceptor). Apply the aggregate recipe in-place. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.
expectations: @EntityCreator on constructor (likely on the RegisterGame factory or no-arg one)

assertions.text: @EntityCreator on constructor (likely on the RegisterGame factory or no-arg one)

evals.name: spring-axoniq-dwelling-snapshot-blocker-emitted
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. Dwelling declares @Aggregate(snapshotTriggerDefinition="dwellingSnapshotTrigger"). AF5 has no portable equivalent → expect Blocker B1. No decision is pre-pinned — the recipe must emit the Blocker rather than silently dropping the attribute. Copy the Result block VERBATIM (must contain the Options list with skip/revert/solve-manually) to $WORKSPACE/result.md. The file MAY be partially rewritten by OpenRewrite — do not fail the eval if so; we only check the recipe's emitted Result.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator emits a `**Result:** 🚧 Blocker` block naming the blocker, with the three default Options (skip / revert / solve-manually). The source on disk MAY be partially edited; the recipe MUST NOT silently bypass the blocker.

evals.name: spring-axoniq-shipment-deadline-blocker
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. Shipment uses @DeadlineHandler + DeadlineManager. AF5 has no direct successor → expect Blocker B4. Copy the Result block verbatim (must enumerate the three default Options) to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator emits a `**Result:** 🚧 Blocker` block naming the blocker, with the three default Options (skip / revert / solve-manually). The source on disk MAY be partially edited; the recipe MUST NOT silently bypass the blocker.

evals.name: spring-axoniq-inventory-map-aggregatemember-blocker
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. Inventory has `@AggregateMember private Map<String, StockItem> items` — AF5 @EntityMember does NOT support Map-typed members → expect Blocker B2. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator emits a `**Result:** 🚧 Blocker` block naming the blocker, with the three default Options (skip / revert / solve-manually). The source on disk MAY be partially edited; the recipe MUST NOT silently bypass the blocker.

Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.
expectations: Path A annotation NOT applied (this is native/Path B)

assertions.text: Path A annotation NOT applied (this is native/Path B)

evals.name: spring-axoniq-projector-rejected
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. The source is a read-model projector (@ProcessingGroup + @EventHandler), NOT an aggregate. The orchestrator's Match step in single mode must EITHER ask which recipe to apply OR (if it forces aggregate based on the user's recipe hint) the aggregate recipe must reject. For this eval, assume the user pinned recipe=aggregate — the recipe's # Applicable predicate must reject. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ⏭️ Rejected` block. The source on disk is unchanged — the aggregate recipe's `# Applicable` predicate decided this is not an aggregate.

evals.name: spring-axoniq-idempotent-already-migrated-calendar
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. The source is ALREADY on AF5 shape (extracted from .knowledge/repositories/axon-examples/axon5). Recipe must return Success with NOTES indicating `edits=none (idempotent)` per FLOW.md S5 pre-Apply check. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.

evals.name: spring-axoniq-giftcard-multi-entity-list
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. GiftCard has `@AggregateMember List<Transaction> transactions`. AF5 maps this to `@EntityMember(routingKey = "txId") List<Transaction>` on the parent + Transaction becomes a child entity with its own @EntityCreator + @EntityId-derived routing (no class-level @EventSourcedEntity on a child — it's reached via the parent). Both GiftCard.java AND the secondary Transaction.java in the same workspace must be rewritten. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.
expectations: Transaction child has @EntityCreator on its constructor
Child Transaction NOT annotated with class-level @EventSourced — reached via parent
Child Transaction NOT annotated with @EventSourcedEntity — reached via parent

assertions.text: Transaction child has @EntityCreator on its constructor
Child Transaction NOT annotated with class-level @EventSourced — reached via parent
Child Transaction NOT annotated with @EventSourcedEntity — reached via parent

evals.name: native-axoniq-polymorphic-card-hierarchy
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=native mode=single source=$SOURCE`. Card is an abstract @AggregateRoot with two concrete subtypes (OpenLoopGiftCard, RechargeableGiftCard, both @Aggregate). AF5 shape: base class carries @EventSourcedEntity(concreteTypes = {OpenLoopGiftCard.class, RechargeableGiftCard.class}), subtypes are NOT annotated. Migrate the base AND the two subtypes. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.

evals.name: invalid-arg-unsupported-framework
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=spring configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. `framework=spring` is NOT supported (must be `axon` or `axoniq`). Per SKILL.md pre-step 1, the orchestrator MUST STOP and report unsupported framework — no migration runs. Write whatever message the orchestrator produces verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator STOPS at the pre-step and reports the invalid argument verbatim. No migration runs; the source on disk is unchanged.

evals.name: spring-axoniq-partial-already-rewritten
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE`. PartialCalendarSpring.java is a realistic OpenRewrite-Phase-1 partial state: `@EventSourced` annotation is present (mechanically swapped from `@Aggregate`) but tagKey/idType attributes are missing; `@AggregateIdentifier` annotation + import still there; `@CreationPolicy(CREATE_IF_MISSING)` still there; `AggregateLifecycle.apply(...)` still in handler bodies; no `@EntityCreator`; no `EventAppender` parameter; AF4 `@CommandHandler` / `@EventSourcingHandler` imports. The recipe MUST apply # Applicable predicate 5 (partially-migrated event-sourced aggregate — continue to Research), find that the Success Criteria pre-Apply check fails (AF4 imports present, no EntityCreator, no EventAppender threading), run Plan-Apply once, and finish the migration to a fully-AF5 shape. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file(s) are on AF5 shape per the aggregate recipe, and the orchestrator emits a `**Result:** ✅ Success` block.
expectations: @EventSourced annotation now has explicit tagKey attribute (was missing in partial state)
Result block marks Success with axon4to5-aggregate

assertions.text: @EventSourced now has explicit tagKey attribute (was missing in partial state)
AF4 AggregateLifecycle reference + static import removed

evals.name: native-axoniq-bike-snapshot-migrate-to-policy
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=native mode=single source=$SOURCE`. BikeWithSnapshot.java is an AF4 aggregate with `@Aggregate(snapshotTriggerDefinition = "bikeSnapshotDefinition")`. The companion bean BikeSnapshotDefinition.java extends EventCountSnapshotTriggerDefinition with threshold 10. The recipe MUST auto-migrate (not emit Blocker B1): detect the translatable companion bean, replace the snapshotTriggerDefinition attribute with `EventSourcedEntityModule.declarative(String.class, Bike.class).snapshotPolicy(c -> SnapshotPolicy.afterEvents(10)).build()` in a new or existing Configurer registration, register a SnapshotStore, and mark BikeSnapshotDefinition as dead code in LEARNINGS. The entity class must end on `@EventSourcedEntity(tagKey = "Bike", idType = String.class)`. Copy the Result block verbatim to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file is on AF5 Path B shape; the recipe auto-migrated the snapshot trigger to EventSourcedEntityModule.declarative(...).snapshotPolicy(...); orchestrator emits `**Result:** ✅ Success`.

assertions.text: Result names dead code companion bean

evals.name: native-axoniq-partial-already-rewritten
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=native mode=single source=$SOURCE`. PartialOrderNative.java is the framework-Configurer (Path B) equivalent of eval 29: `@EventSourcedEntity` annotation already present (swapped from `@AggregateRoot`) but with NO tagKey/idType attributes; `@AggregateIdentifier` still there; `@CreationPolicy(ALWAYS)` still there; `AggregateLifecycle.apply(...)` in handler bodies; AF4 `@CommandHandler` / `@EventSourcingHandler` imports; no `@EntityCreator`; no `EventAppender` parameter. The recipe MUST apply predicate 5 (partial), see Success Criteria mismatch, run Plan-Apply once, and finish the migration. The `@CreationPolicy(ALWAYS)` should become a **static** `@CommandHandler` factory per the recipe's # Common steps § @CreationPolicy mapping. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Migrated source file is on AF5 Path B shape per the aggregate recipe; the orchestrator emits `**Result:** ✅ Success`.
expectations: @EventSourcedEntity annotation now has explicit tagKey attribute (was missing)
The @CreationPolicy(ALWAYS) creation handler became a static @CommandHandler factory
Path A Spring stereotype (@EventSourced from extension.spring) was NOT introduced (this is Path B)
Result block marks Success with axon4to5-aggregate

assertions.text: Path B annotation @EventSourcedEntity preserved (was already present)
@EventSourcedEntity now has explicit tagKey attribute (was missing)
Path A Spring stereotype NOT introduced (this is Path B)
